SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
